---
title: "validate_phrases.py"
path: "C:\Users\Craig\Corvus\CorvusStar\scripts\validate_phrases.py"
loc: 54
complexity: 17
logic_score: 5.85
style_score: 3.80
intel_score: 4.36
overall_score: 2.57
---

## Intent
The `validate_phrases.py` sector implements high-complexity logic focusing on validate_persona_phrases, main. It forms a node in the Gungnir Matrix.

## Interaction Protocol
Integrate via validate_persona_phrases, main. Follow the Linscott Standard for this sector.

## Gungnir Matrix Breakdown
- **Logic [L]**: 5.8/10
- **Style [S]**: 3.8/10
- **Intel [I]**: 4.4/10
- **Gravity [G]**: 6 interactions (Agent Activity Hotspot)



## Neural Pathways

### Imports
- [sys](file://sys)
- [pathlib](file://pathlib)
- [yaml](file://yaml)

### Exports
- `validate_persona_phrases`
- `main`
